_doc: Asset registry for The Sleeping Vein. Every art asset that ships in the game must have an entry. Status values: 'needed' (not generated yet), 'draft' (Gemini raw output saved, not finalized), 'final' (in-game), 'hybrid' (Gemini silhouette + Aseprite pass). Lore refs point to lore/*.md anchors. See docs/design/00_tile_atlas_spec.md for canonical sizes. Antigravity workflow lives in prompts/_HOWTO.md.

_palette_targets.global: AAP-64 base + 6 biome accent ramps; see docs/design/00_tile_atlas_spec.md §6

_notes: Many entries below are 'asset groups' — a single prompt file produces multiple cropped output PNGs. The prompt file's POST-GENERATION block lists individual output paths.
When Antigravity completes a group, it should expand the entry into per-output sub-entries OR update the parent entry's status to 'final' with output_paths populated.
All entries with status 'needed' represent open work. Sorted roughly by phase.

assets.notes: Phase 10 closure 2026-05-16: 2x2 sheet split by tools/process_phase10_assets.py. salt_bound_sailor + deep_mawl + spore_lurk pre-existed from earlier passes; the captain / coral_hollow / cricket / fox came from this sheet.
Phase 10 closure 2026-05-16: existing sprite reused; wired into scenes/enemies/vorrkell.tscn with 3-phase attack pattern.
Phase 10 closure 2026-05-16: existing sprite reused; spawns Coral Hollow minions instead of generic stoneslough.

Single Gemini sheet (1536x672) split into 16 16x16 icons by tools/process_phase3_assets.py. Top 70% of each grid cell used to skip Gemini-rendered text labels.
Phase 8 closure 2026-05-15: superseded by 5 Phase-8 Gemini sheets below. The per-asset entries cover the actual ItemDef ids this set originally targeted.

covers: 20 food items — see prompt POST-GENERATION block

16-cell 4x4 grid. Split by tools/process_phase8_assets.py at 78% cell height (Gemini added bottom-of-cell text labels).
16-cell 4x4 grid, full-cell crop (no labels).
16-cell 4x4 grid; 4 cells unused. 78% cell crop.
16-cell 4x4 grid; 6 unused. Full-cell crop (no labels).

16-cell 4x4 grid of placeable inventory icons. Each PNG is reused as the in-world Sprite2D texture for the matching structure scene until the Phase 15 asset polish gate replaces them with dedicated 32x32 in-world sprites.
Phase 10 closure 2026-05-16: 16-cell 4x4 grid covering breath/resist equipment, boss relics, the optional Drowned Crown drops, and Phase-10 placeables. Split by tools/process_phase10_assets.py.

Regenerated as dedicated single-asset image because grid-cropped version had a too-wide platform exceeding 48x48 frame.
Phase 5.13 bed placeable — top-down 3/4 lean, woven loam-grass mattress + wood frame. Generated via Gemini MCP single-subject prompt, cropped 904x664 from 1024² source, downsampled to 32×32.
Phase 5.14 worship/buff shrine. Vertical cairn of three stacked stones with a faint gold glyph on the top stone.
Phase 5.22 healing-tile shrine. Top-down pale stone disc with a six-pointed knot of gold thread; thread visibly frays as charges deplete (modulate runtime tint).
Phase 5.21 spike-trap placeable. Square dark-stone pressure plate with four shaleseed spines splaying upward from center.

Phase 5.23 hidden door. Same texture is used twice in the scene — once tinted dark wall-color (WallSprite), once tinted bright Aphelion-gold (PassageSprite) — so a single sprite serves both the closed and revealed visuals.
Phase 5.35 pre-fight mural — Stone-Father figure rendered in crude gold + rust-red paint on a rough stone slab. Placed in the corridor approaching Glaur-em's arena.
Phase 5.5 Glaur-em drop. Curved petrified shell fragment with faint gold corruption veins.
Phase 3.70 boss-unique necklace trinket. Dark cord loop with a polished gray-stone sliver pendant + a single warm-gold glow.
Phase 5.19 first-Sovereign title item. Simple 5-point gold circlet rendered front-3/4. Granted automatically on the first boss kill.
Phase 2.34 Mote-Lens tool. Brass + iron cylindrical pinhole camera. Click toward a mob within 120px to unlock its bestiary entry without a kill.
Phase 3.40 consumable scroll. Tan vellum tied with red ribbon. Right-click to roll a previously-unrevealed recipe id; refunds if everything is known.
Set entry tracks remaining tier-2+ workbenches. loam_bench (tier 0) and clearstone_forge (tier 1) are split out as their own final entries.
Generated as standalone via Gemini MCP for Phase 3.11. Cropped + palette-snapped through tools/process_phase3_assets.py.

Phase 3 follow-up: missing-icon backfill for Phase 1/2 materials and drops the player encounters during normal play. 4x2 grid, no text labels (icon_h_frac=1.0).

Phase 3 follow-up: Phase 8 farming/cooking/fishing icons + 5.x Sovereign Name fragment. Some cells (memory_root_seed) rendered as bowl-shaped placeholders by Gemini — usable but slated for regen during Phase 8 polish.

1344x768 Gemini sheet cropped via hand-tuned bounds in tools/process_phase3_assets.py. Used as decorative backdrops behind procedural Godot StyleBoxFlat panels — the spec aspect ratios drifted in Gemini output but pixel content is usable.
